title: Craftable.Tridents
description: It is a mod that helps you to craft tridents
body:
Craftable Tridents [1.21+]

Tired of hunting down Drowned mobs for a rare chance to get a trident? With Craftable Tridents, you can now easily craft this iconic weapon using vanilla materials! This mod brings the ability to craft tridents into Minecraft without disrupting gameplay.

Features:

Craft Tridents: Use a new crafting recipe to forge your very own trident using accessible materials found in the game.
1.21 Compatibility: Fully updated to work seamlessly with the new content and mechanics introduced in Minecraft 1.21.
Multiplayer Friendly: Works on both single-player and multiplayer servers without any issues.
Installation:

Download the mod for Minecraft 1.21 from Modrinth.
Install using your preferred mod loader (Forge or Fabric).
Start crafting and enjoy your new tridents!
With Craftable Tridents, enjoy greater flexibility in your adventure and unlock the power of the seas without the grind!
